title: Pattern library catalog (#269)
description: Bridges per-axis extractor outputs to substrate-native Loom primitives. Mapping engine (#273) walks this catalog.

trope.description: True iff this pattern is a SaaS shape that gets translated to a substrate-native counterpart.

source_signals.description: Free-form signal sketch describing the SHAPE that triggers this pattern. Mapping engine evaluates against extractor output.

substrate_target.description: CmsSection slug the mapping engine emits when this pattern matches.

substrate_variant_hint.description: Optional variant string passed through to the emitted SectionSpec.

rejected_alternatives.description: CmsSection slugs the engine refuses to emit for this pattern even on high confidence.
